steps.t: Skalla can be found in Vegbár. You should talk to Skalla.
Langhár has asked you to find a way into Goblin-town to disrupt the hobgoblins inside. You should complete 'Watchers at the Gate' and find the Beornin…
The Beorning scout near the Goblin-gate can escort you into Goblin-town. You should enter Goblin-town to disrupt the hobgoblins' takeover.
Now that you have access to the Goblin-town throne room, you should do what you can to interfere with the hobgoblins' efforts there. You should comple…
Skalla can be found in Vegbár, the Beorning outpost in northern Wolf-denes. You should talk to Skalla.
